title: A New Age of War Is Declared
description: On pages 7–9, this part follows Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8, Usopp, Jarul, Loki, Unknown person #9 as Elbaf’s warriors, Jarul, and the younger giants clash over the future of the island while dark forces twist pride and tradition into violence.
scene: Elbaf’s warriors, Jarul, and the younger giants clash over the future of the island while dark forces twist pride and tradition into violence.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I know, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: On that day, I felt a strange animation of Haki coming from Quest Castle...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Shanks and I went there to investigate. Looking back...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's possible we didn't have the whole story.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: You went to the castle?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: What the-?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Wait?! Did you just say thanks?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: stansen, I'm sorry! Go ahead without me!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ZORO!! Sanji!! I'll catch up in a bit!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: This dumb shanks thing again...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Hey! Don't call shanks dumb!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: He means you're the dumb one!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: G'HABAN!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hajrubin, who else can get him talking? You may have had different mothers, but you're still brothers.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: YOU HAVE THREE MINUTES TO EXPLAIN, LOOK!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Tell me what happened in the Castle 14 years ago!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you truly consider yourself a warrior of Elbaf, swear on our gods that what you say is the truth!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: That's cruel, brother.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You really want me to relive that day?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I don't want to remember...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: It WAS AN AWFUL DAY!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Look! up in the sky!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: 14 years ago

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Doga ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Uwah!! It's 10k!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: PRINCE LOL HAS RETURNED!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Elbaf, Quest Castle

dialogue.speaker: Jarul
dialogue.text: Elder JARUL JUST arrived too!

dialogue.speaker: Loki
dialogue.text: He summoned you too, Loki?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: something like that. This is my family's home, you know?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You seem well, old man!! You haven't grown sick of life yet?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Quiet, you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: The King is in the audience chamber.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I wonder what he wants...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's hard to care about the whims of a government dog!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He sold out to the people who killed rocks!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If that's the direction Elbaf's heading, then I'll oppose it!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: You're being loud...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm too old for this stuff. Politics is a young man's game.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We're in this mess because you keep spouting that kind of nonsense!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now we've got a whole generation of peace-added brats who can't even hold a weapon!

summary: This part advances the The Giants Turn on Their Legend through 41 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
